calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-09-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-09-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: James J. McBride; Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Proceedings Not Reported.

Ruth H. Downes, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Midland Funding, LLC.
Stephen Booth, Esq. appeared for defendant Danny Shipman, who was not present at today's hearing.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on February 3, 2014.
Declaration of Plaintiff in Lieu of Personal Testimony at Trial CCP Section 98 was served on defendant by not filed with the Court.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of defendant Danny Shipman and against plaintiff Mindland Funding, LLC as follows:

Defendant Danny Shipman shall have judgment against the complaint of plaintiff Midland Funding, LLC and that Midland Funding, LLC shall taken nothing by way of its complaint against defendant Danny Shipman.

Judgment for defendant Danny Shipman was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2014 Set For Trial On Jun-09-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
